prompt: Create a square gothic-romantic monochrome anime illustration with a delicate antique frame. The scene shows an androgynous young man named Gika leaning his cheek on one gloved hand, gazing forward with a tired, melancholic expression. He has tousled short silver-white hair, pale skin, soft golden-gray eyes, and a refined fragile beauty. He wears a white Victorian blouse with puffed sleeves, a high ruffled collar, buttoned cuffs, a black ribbon tie, and elegant white gloves. Behind him on the left is an ornate oval mirror with a carved baroque frame, reflecting a faint ghostlike side view of his face and hair. Surround him with dense botanical details: exactly 2 large white orchid blossoms in the upper right, 5 closed orchid buds on arcing stems, clusters of many tiny white flowers in the lower left and center, dark leaves in the foreground, and shadowy foliage filling the background. Add vertical Japanese title text on the left reading 擬花, set in elegant pale beige calligraphy with thin decorative horizontal dividers above and below it. Use a muted sepia grayscale palette, soft watercolor and ink textures, high-detail shoujo manga rendering, misty shadows, subtle grain, and gentle rim lighting on the hair and blouse. Compose the figure slightly right of center, cropped close at the torso, with the mirror occupying the upper left and flowers framing the face. Add a thin antique gold border around the entire image with small symmetrical filigree ornaments in all four corners and tiny floral flourishes centered on the top and bottom edges. Keep the mood quiet, sorrowful, ethereal, and vintage; no modern objects, no bright colors, no extra characters, no watermark.
